# CalculatorBoss

> CalculatorBoss (calculatorboss.com) is a free online calculator library covering finance, health, math, crypto/markets, and everyday conversions. No sign-up, no popups, instant answers.

## Site
- [Homepage](https://calculatorboss.com/): Full calculator directory and popular tools.
- [All Calculators](https://calculatorboss.com/all-calculators/): Complete browsable list of every calculator on the site.
- [About](https://calculatorboss.com/about/): About CalculatorBoss.
